channel.title: Worldbuilding on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Worldbuilding on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: Self-Consistent Lore
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about self-consistent lore.

item.title: Let's Talk About Canon
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, let’s talk about Canon.

item.title: Leaving Some Mystery
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about leaving some mystery in your games.

item.title: Non-Expository Arcanum Lore
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about non-expository Arcanum lore.

item.title: Non-Expository Fallout Lore
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, for a fun Friday, I wanted to talk about nonexpository Fallout lore.

item.title: Fallout Lore Exploration
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Fallout lore exploration.

item.title: Anemoia
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about anamoya, which is feeling nostalgia for a time and place that you’ve never known — And yes

item.title: Sci-Fi vs. High Fantasy Settings
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about sci-fi versus high F fantasy settings, specifically in a new IP.

item.title: Arcanum Lore Exploration
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. I want to talk to you today about Arcanum lore exploration.

item.title: A World Building Tip
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to give you a World building tip and of course, before I do it, I kind of want to give you context and then I’ll give you the tip, which is a one sentence tip, and then I’ll talk about it at length.

item.title: Naming Things
item.description: Hi everybody. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about naming things.

item.title: Converting A Movie Into A Game
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about converting, like a movie or TV show into a game.

item.title: Galactic Coordinates
item.description: Hi everyone, it’s me, Tim. It’s Friday, Funday, so I wanted to pull something out of my idea book about Galactic coordinates.

item.title: Thinking "What If?" In Detail
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about a technique I call thinking what if in detail?

item.title: Games Predicting Our Future
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about games predicting our future.

item.title: Using Mechanics For Storytelling
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about using Mechanics for storytelling, and

item.title: An Example Of Making A New IP
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about making an IP an actual example.

item.title: Lore Drift
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today let’s talk about lore drift.

item.title: Making Good Factions
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about making good factions for your games.

item.title: Game Lore
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about game lore.

item.title: Lord Of Light CRPG
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer another question, this one from aramel whisperwind, who asks.

item.title: Setting Ideas
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about setting ideas.

item.title: Arcanum: Explaining The Void
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the void in Arcanum and this is something that somebody asked about.

item.title: The Origin of Fallout's Setting
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the beginning, the creation of the origin of the Fallout setting.

item.title: How To Make A Good Game Setting
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how to make a good setting for computer games.

item.title: My Favorite Sci Fi Novel
item.description: Hi, it’s Tim. I’m back with the answer to the first topic that, uh, someone had a question about on my last video, and that was user Hyperion said that
